# Cooking Bel Beit

> Home-style Lebanese and Mediterranean recipes from Katia's kitchen, with step-by-step instructions for everyday cooking.

Cooking Bel Beit is a recipe collection by Katia, the cook and mom behind @cooking_bel_beit. The site features traditional Lebanese dishes, international favorites, breads, desserts, salads, soups, and family-tested meals. Each recipe includes ingredients, grouped instructions, cooking time, servings, and printable formatting. Recipes are organized by category and can be browsed or searched directly from the homepage.

## Pages

- [/](/): Featured recipes and category highlights.
- [/recipes](/recipes): Browse all recipes in one searchable list.
- [/about](/about): About Katia, her cooking journey, and what you'll find on the site.
- [/contact](/contact): Get in touch or share feedback.

## Featured Recipes

- [/recipe/garlic-parmesan-turkey-bread](/recipe/garlic-parmesan-turkey-bread): Pull-apart dinner rolls shaped like a turkey, brushed with garlic parmesan butter.
- [/recipe/festive-chocolate-bark](/recipe/festive-chocolate-bark): Swirled chocolate bark topped with holiday candies and crushed candy canes.
- [/recipe/spiced-christmas-star-cookies](/recipe/spiced-christmas-star-cookies): Warmly spiced star cookies dipped in a simple sugar icing.
- [/recipe/sayyadiyeh](/recipe/sayyadiyeh): Perfectly cooked white fish with marinated rice.
- [/recipe/mehcheh-coussa](/recipe/mehcheh-coussa): Stuffed zucchinis cooked in tomato sauce.
- [/recipe/cooked-artichokes](/recipe/cooked-artichokes): Cooked artichokes Lebanese mezze
- [/recipe/roast-beef](/recipe/roast-beef): Garlic-studded roast beef with green beans, mash, and silky pan gravy.
- [/recipe/chocoalte-and-red-berries-cupcakes](/recipe/chocoalte-and-red-berries-cupcakes): Almond-meal chocolate & red-berry cupcakes, maple-sweet and fluffy.

## All Recipes

- [/recipe/sweet-potato-and-minced-meat-power-bowl](/recipe/sweet-potato-and-minced-meat-power-bowl): A quick power bowl with roasted sweet potato, minced meat, mozzarella, avocado, and fresh salad.
- [/recipe/sardine-dip](/recipe/sardine-dip): A simple sardine dip with lemon, capers, red onion, parsley, and cress.
- [/recipe/tahini-carob-freezer-slices](/recipe/tahini-carob-freezer-slices): A no-bake freezer dessert with tahini, carob molasses, sesame seeds, walnuts, and almonds.
- [/recipe/healthy-date-peanut-butter-bars](/recipe/healthy-date-peanut-butter-bars): Layered bars made with dates, peanut butter, banana, and dark chocolate.
- [/recipe/turkish-style-tray-lamb-with-vegetables](/recipe/turkish-style-tray-lamb-with-vegetables): A tray-baked lamb dish with onions, tomatoes, peppers, garlic, and a tangy tomato-sumac sauce.
- [/recipe/sweet-potato-chocolate-mousse-cake](/recipe/sweet-potato-chocolate-mousse-cake): A rich chocolate mousse cake made with sweet potatoes, dark chocolate, and cocoa.
- [/recipe/yekhnit-artichoke](/recipe/yekhnit-artichoke): A soft, lemony artichoke stew with meat, onions, and a light flour-thickened broth.
- [/recipe/fteer-il-zaatar](/recipe/fteer-il-zaatar): A layered zaatar bread filled with fresh zaatar, onions, sumac, and olive oil.
- [/recipe/chicken-burger-with-creamy-slaw-and-melted-cheddar](/recipe/chicken-burger-with-creamy-slaw-and-melted-cheddar): A juicy chicken burger with creamy slaw, melted cheddar, onion rounds, and brioche buns.
- [/recipe/sushi-date-rolls](/recipe/sushi-date-rolls): Soft date rolls with peanut butter, banana, walnuts, and shredded coconut.
- [/recipe/green-fava-bean-maklouba](/recipe/green-fava-bean-maklouba): A spring-inspired maklouba with green fava beans, lamb, turmeric rice, and nuts.
- [/recipe/date-molasses-kaak](/recipe/date-molasses-kaak): Small almond flour kaak sweetened with date molasses and coated in sesame seeds.
- [/recipe/green-almond-herb-salad-with-pomegranate](/recipe/green-almond-herb-salad-with-pomegranate): A crisp spring salad with green almonds, herbs, cucumber, pomegranate, and lemon.
- [/recipe/air-fryer-chicken-veggie-bowl-with-avocado-and-quinoa](/recipe/air-fryer-chicken-veggie-bowl-with-avocado-and-quinoa): An air fryer bowl with marinated chicken, vegetables, quinoa, and fresh avocado.
- [/recipe/kebab-sandwich-oven-baked-tray](/recipe/kebab-sandwich-oven-baked-tray): A flavorful tray-baked kebab sandwich with hummus, sumac onions, rocca, and tomatoes.
- [/recipe/soft-chocolate-cookies-with-lotus-and-pistachio](/recipe/soft-chocolate-cookies-with-lotus-and-pistachio): Rich soft chocolate cookies finished with melted Lotus and pistachio spread.
- [/recipe/chicken-curry-with-coconut-milk](/recipe/chicken-curry-with-coconut-milk): A quick chicken curry with coconut milk, peppers, zucchini, parsley, and raisins.
- [/recipe/baked-paccheri-bolognese-with-bechamel](/recipe/baked-paccheri-bolognese-with-bechamel): Paccheri baked with rich Bolognese, creamy béchamel, and mozzarella.
- [/recipe/date-almond-chocolate-bark](/recipe/date-almond-chocolate-bark): A simple 3-ingredient bark with dates, dark chocolate, and roasted almonds.
- [/recipe/homemade-baguette](/recipe/homemade-baguette): Fresh homemade baguette with a simple flour, water, salt, and yeast dough.
- [/recipe/green-smoothie](/recipe/green-smoothie): A nourishing green smoothie with yogurt, banana, avocado, pineapple, spinach, and honey.
- [/recipe/zaalouk](/recipe/zaalouk): A Moroccan eggplant and tomato dip with herbs, spices, lemon, and pomegranate.
- [/recipe/lentil-soup-with-pumpkin-kibbeh](/recipe/lentil-soup-with-pumpkin-kibbeh): A hearty lentil and bulgur soup with vegetables, lemon, parsley, and pumpkin kibbeh.
- [/recipe/kibbet-batata](/recipe/kibbet-batata): A Lebanese potato kibbeh with bulgur, onion, walnuts, and olive oil.
- [/recipe/crepes](/recipe/crepes): Thin, delicate homemade crêpes with a simple milk, cream, and egg batter.
- [/recipe/coconut-fish-curry-with-vegetables](/recipe/coconut-fish-curry-with-vegetables): A creamy coconut fish curry with carrots, peas, spinach, and warm spices.
- [/recipe/baked-kafta-with-tomato-paste](/recipe/baked-kafta-with-tomato-paste): Oven-baked kafta with onions, tomatoes, cherry tomatoes, and green chili.
- [/recipe/lent-veggie-sandwich](/recipe/lent-veggie-sandwich): A fresh sandwich layered with roasted vegetables, sumac onion, and crisp salad.
- [/recipe/kishk-soup](/recipe/kishk-soup): A creamy kishk soup with tender lamb, garlic, and traditional Lebanese sides.
- [/recipe/giant-butter-beans-spinach-stew](/recipe/giant-butter-beans-spinach-stew): A hearty butter bean stew with vegetables, stock, rice, and baby spinach.
- [/recipe/chicory-olive-saj-sandwich](/recipe/chicory-olive-saj-sandwich): Simple Lebanese chicory and olive saj sandwich.

- [/recipe/freekeh-chicken-saffron](/recipe/freekeh-chicken-saffron): Nutty freekeh with chicken, warm spices and saffron.
- [/recipe/porcini-chestnut-mushroom-soup](/recipe/porcini-chestnut-mushroom-soup): Creamy mushroom soup with porcini and chestnuts.
- [/recipe/homemade-pickled-turnips](/recipe/homemade-pickled-turnips): Classic Lebanese pink pickled turnips with beet and garlic.
- [/recipe/freekeh-salad-with-roasted-pumpkin](/recipe/freekeh-salad-with-roasted-pumpkin): Vibrant freekeh salad with roasted pumpkin, avocado, pomegranate, and molasses dressing.

- [/recipe/fattet-shrimp-aubergine-yogurt-tahini](/recipe/fattet-shrimp-aubergine-yogurt-tahini): Roasted aubergine and chickpeas layered with creamy yogurt-tahini sauce, juicy shrimp, and crunchy toppings.
- [/recipe/bulgur-banadoura-garlic-cucumber-yogurt](/recipe/bulgur-banadoura-garlic-cucumber-yogurt): Hearty bulgur pilav simmered with tomatoes and chickpeas, served with a cool garlic-cucumber yogurt.
- [/recipe/bresaola-sandwich-spelt-country-bread](/recipe/bresaola-sandwich-spelt-country-bread): Toasted spelt country bread layered with Parmesan, mozzarella, tomatoes, bresaola, and fresh rocca.
- [/recipe/mini-labneh-and-makdous-cups](/recipe/mini-labneh-and-makdous-cups): Bite-sized cups with creamy labneh, tangy makdouss, and fresh mint.

- [/recipe/japanese-style-egg-sandwich](/recipe/japanese-style-egg-sandwich): Creamy, fluffy egg salad made by separating yolks and whites, layered on soft pain de mie with avocado.
- [/recipe/chocolate-banana-apple-syrup-tarte-tatin](/recipe/chocolate-banana-apple-syrup-tarte-tatin): Skillet tarte tatin of bananas set in an apple-syrup butter caramel with melted dark chocolate, baked under puff pastry and flipped to serve.
- [/recipe/potato-crusted-swiss-chard-tart](/recipe/potato-crusted-swiss-chard-tart): Potato-crusted tart with Swiss chard, onions, garlic, eggs, cream, and mozzarella—golden, soft, and comforting.
- [/recipe/quick-marinated-green-olives](/recipe/quick-marinated-green-olives): Fresh green olives mixed with coarse salt, lemon, chili, and a drop of olive oil. Ready in about five days.
- [/recipe/sayyadiyeh](/recipe/sayyadiyeh): Perfectly cooked white fish with marinated rice.
- [/recipe/beef-stir-fry-mixed-bell-peppers](/recipe/beef-stir-fry-mixed-bell-peppers): Thin-sliced beef and colorful peppers in a glossy soy-oyster sauce with ginger, garlic, and sesame.
- [/recipe/mint-pea-quinoa-blinis](/recipe/mint-pea-quinoa-blinis): Oven-baked blinis of peas, ricotta, quinoa, and mint with a lemony yogurt sauce.
- [/recipe/tahini-pistachio-date-bites](/recipe/tahini-pistachio-date-bites): No-bake date and tahini bites rolled in pistachio and cardamom. Naturally sweet.
- [/recipe/smoked-salmon-sandwich-sourdough](/recipe/smoked-salmon-sandwich-sourdough): Avocado, cottage cheese with dill, rocket leaves, smoked salmon, and red onion on sourdough.

- [/recipe/chard-black-eyed-peas](/recipe/chard-black-eyed-peas): Tender black-eyed peas, caramelized onions, and fresh lemon juice over chard.

- [/recipe/stuffed-are3](/recipe/stuffed-are3): Zesty stuffed wild squash with rice, minced meat, garlic, dried mint, and lemon.

- [/recipe/chocolate-cake-with-glossy-glaze](/recipe/chocolate-cake-with-glossy-glaze): Super easy, deeply chocolatey Bundt cake with a luscious dark-chocolate glaze.
- [/recipe/chard-stems-with-tahini](/recipe/chard-stems-with-tahini): Tender chard stems tossed in a tangy garlic-lemon tahini sauce—simple and nostalgic.
- [/recipe/upside-down-date-and-coffee-cake](/recipe/upside-down-date-and-coffee-cake): Caramelized date top with a moist coffee-almond cake—unique, memorable, and so good.
- [/recipe/millefeuille-nabe-layered-hot-pot](/recipe/millefeuille-nabe-layered-hot-pot): Delicate layers of Napa cabbage, bok choy, beef or pork belly, and enoki mushrooms in a savory broth.
- [/recipe/no-bake-date-peanut-bars](/recipe/no-bake-date-peanut-bars): Chewy date–peanut butter layer with puffed rice and peanuts, topped with milk chocolate.
- [/recipe/khebzit-souraya-greek-tsoureki](/recipe/khebzit-souraya-greek-tsoureki): Soft, fragrant braided Easter bread flavored with mahlepi, mastic, and orange.
- [/recipe/broccoli-gratin-with-ricotta](/recipe/broccoli-gratin-with-ricotta): Rescue yellowing broccoli with this easy béchamel gratin—cheddar inside, ricotta on top.
- [/recipe/maqloubeh-batenjen-eggplant](/recipe/maqloubeh-batenjen-eggplant): A show-stopping upside-down rice with eggplant, cauliflower, carrots, and chicken.
- [/recipe/roasted-cauliflower-chickpea-spinach-salad](/recipe/roasted-cauliflower-chickpea-spinach-salad): Bold flavors and crunchy textures—seeds, spices, dates, and greens make this a satisfying main or side.
- [/recipe/caramel-sea-salt-chocolate-cookies](/recipe/caramel-sea-salt-chocolate-cookies): Chunky, chocolatey cookies dotted with caramel sea salt pieces—crispy edges, soft centers.
- [/recipe/veg-peel-crisps-with-curry-salt](/recipe/veg-peel-crisps-with-curry-salt): Crispy baked peels (carrot, parsnip, potato, radish) tossed in an easy curry salt.
- [/recipe/stuffed-silverbeet-leaves-selek-mehshi](/recipe/stuffed-silverbeet-leaves-selek-mehshi): Tender chard leaves filled with rice, chickpeas, tomato, parsley, and mint—finished with lemon.

- [/recipe/duck-fat-potatoes-with-rosemary](/recipe/duck-fat-potatoes-with-rosemary): Crispy, golden potatoes roasted in duck fat and finished with rosemary and salt flakes.
- [/recipe/seeded-brioche-rolls](/recipe/seeded-brioche-rolls): Soft, golden, butterless brioche buns packed with pumpkin, sunflower, and flax seeds.
- [/recipe/cauliflower-frittata-goats-curd](/recipe/cauliflower-frittata-goats-curd): Baked frittata with cauliflower, chard, and creamy goat’s curd.
- [/recipe/tuscan-pasta-salad](/recipe/tuscan-pasta-salad): Colorful Italian salad with fusilli, peppers, onion, and mozzarella tossed in herby dressing.
- [/recipe/sheet-pan-chicken-curry-pickled-onions](/recipe/sheet-pan-chicken-curry-pickled-onions): Spicy chicken and roasted cauliflower baked together, topped with tangy quick-pickled onions.
- [/recipe/portobello-mushroom-fajitas](/recipe/portobello-mushroom-fajitas): Smoky, colorful fajitas filled with mushrooms, corn, and avocado-lime guacamole.
- [/recipe/vegan-miso-chickpea-ramen](/recipe/vegan-miso-chickpea-ramen): Comforting plant-based ramen with mushrooms, chickpeas, noodles, and a rich miso broth.
- [/recipe/broccoli-spinach-soup-hazelnut-chia](/recipe/broccoli-spinach-soup-hazelnut-chia): Silky green soup topped with charred broccoli, toasted hazelnuts, and chia seeds.
- [/recipe/sweet-potato-chorizo-hash](/recipe/sweet-potato-chorizo-hash): Crispy sweet potato, kohlrabi, and spicy chorizo finished under the grill with eggs and parmesan.
- [/recipe/hasselback-sweet-potatoes-salsa-verde](/recipe/hasselback-sweet-potatoes-salsa-verde): Roasted hasselback kumara topped with parmesan, fresh salsa verde, and basil.
- [/recipe/chocolate-chip-scones-vanilla-glaze](/recipe/chocolate-chip-scones-vanilla-glaze): Crisp on the outside, tender within—loaded with chocolate chips and drizzled with vanilla glaze.
- [/recipe/lemon-chia-ricotta-muffins](/recipe/lemon-chia-ricotta-muffins): Light, zesty muffins with ricotta and chia seeds, finished with a lemon glaze.
- [/recipe/cinnamon-shortbread-cookies](/recipe/cinnamon-shortbread-cookies): Buttery cinnamon shortbread cut into stars, moons, and clouds—perfect with tea.
- [/recipe/pillow-cinnamon-rolls-cream-cheese-icing](/recipe/pillow-cinnamon-rolls-cream-cheese-icing): Soft, fluffy cinnamon rolls brushed with tangzhong and topped with rich cream cheese icing.
- [/recipe/caramelized-onion-tarte-tatin](/recipe/caramelized-onion-tarte-tatin): A savory twist on the classic—deeply caramelized onions baked under flaky puff pastry.
- [/recipe/raspberry-christmas-wreath](/recipe/raspberry-christmas-wreath): Festive braid filled with raspberry jam—golden, soft, and perfect for the holiday table.
- [/recipe/chocolate-pecan-pie](/recipe/chocolate-pecan-pie): A rich chocolate-pecan tart with a hazelnut crust and silky caramel filling.
- [/recipe/granny-smith-apple-pie](/recipe/granny-smith-apple-pie): A classic apple pie made with tart Granny Smith apples and a golden, flaky crust.
- [/recipe/goat-cheese-caramelized-onion-bread-pudding](/recipe/goat-cheese-caramelized-onion-bread-pudding): A savoury bread pudding packed with caramelized onions, goat’s cheese, parmesan, and rosemary.
- [/recipe/baked-apples-dumplings-caramel-sauce](/recipe/baked-apples-dumplings-caramel-sauce): Tender baked apples with fluffy dumplings in a rich caramel sauce.

## Optional

- [Instagram @cooking_bel_beit](https://instagram.com/cooking_bel_beit/): Follow Katia for daily cooking videos and behind-the-scenes updates.
